creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Zsolt Udvari from comment #17)
On 13.3 poudriere fails but on 14.1 builds, only plist issues:

===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: libexec/sdcc/x86_64-portbld-%%PYTHON_PLATFORM%%.1/12.1.0/cc1
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
Error: Missing: bin/sdcdb
Error: Missing: bin/sdcdb.el
Error: Missing: bin/sdcdbsrc.el
Error: Missing: libexec/sdcc/x86_64-portbld-%%PYTHON_PLATFORM%%.3/12.1.0/cc1
===> Error: Plist issues found.
